changelog: AI-powered wellness scoring using Groq Llama 3.3-70B
Monitors 11 data sources — YouTube, Reddit, Google Search, Shopping, Streaming, AI Tools, News, Social Media, Gaming & Messaging
Automated wellness email reports via EmailJS
100% private — all processing done locally on your device
Configurable scan frequency — every 4, 8, 12 or 24 hours
Settings tab — toggle YouTube & Google Search account access
